description_long: This object consists of a rectangular cardboard cigarette box with a flip-top lid, predominantly colored in gold and white stripes, and featuring a blue geometric label with a lion emblem and the word 'HERO' on the front. The box is open, revealing several cylindrical cigarettes inside, each with a white paper body and a brown, patterned filter tip. One cigarette is partially removed and lies outside the box, clearly displaying its filter and paper wrapping. The box also has blue and white branding on the sides and top, with additional text indicating 'KING SIZE' and '20 CLASS A CIGARETTES.' The overall appearance is clean and new, with no visible signs of use, burn marks, or ash. The materials appear to be a combination of paper, cardboard, and tobacco, with the cigarettes tightly packed inside the box.
description: A gold and white HERO-branded cigarette box with a blue lion logo, open to reveal several white cigarettes with brown filters, one of which is partially removed.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open HERO cigarette box with visible branding, lion logo, and several cigarettes inside, plus one cigarette lying outside.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the box, the open lid, and the side branding with a partially removed cigarette protruding.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the box with HERO branding and a cigarette extending outward, less focus on the open lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open lid, side branding, and a clear look at the white cigarette filter and paper.
attribute_brand_logo: The box features a blue lion emblem with the word 'HERO' prominently displayed on the front and sides.
